subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thy letter hath attained, in the Most Great Prison, unto the hearing of the Ancient King. The fragrance of divine love was wafted therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی نامه ات در سجن اعظم باصغاء مالک قدم فائز عرف حب الهی از او متضوع از حق
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
